channel.title: Pages on Sirosabzi
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Sirosabzi

item.title: About
item.description: About This Blog This is a food blog celebrating the art of cooking, with a focus on Persian cuisine and international flavors. Each recipe comes with a story—the inspiration, the technique, and the joy of sharing food. Sirosabzi (سیر سبزی) is a traditional Persian herb and garlic blend, a simple yet essential element of Persian cooking. Like the blend itself, this blog combines various flavors, techniques, and stories into something meaningful.
